title: FBI-UAP-D012, Newark Field Office, 1952-1967
summary: This file details a special inquiry by the Federal Bureau of Investigation’s Newark Field Office of various reported sightings of unidentified flying objects (UFOs) in and near New Jersey between August 1952 and January 1967. These files include memoranda and correspondence between the FBI and the U.S. Air Force regarding UFO sightings, as well as public correspondence concerning various UFO-focused groups.

audience.tldr: FBI investigative document from a Bureau case file documenting a UAP encounter (August 1952-1967) over New Jersey, United States.
what_we_know: Reported location: New Jersey, United States.
what_we_dont: No kinematic data (speed, altitude, maneuver) is attached.
No official conclusion has been issued classifying the object as conventional.
Independent corroboration from non-government sources has not been confirmed.
audience.mundane_candidate: A conventional explanation is technically possible but has not been demonstrated.
audience.score_sentence: Anomalousness Index 58/100. Top drivers: witness credibility (federal_agent), corroboration (single_witness_instrument).
